data.body: Done definition update: Add issue-quality-check.sh (plugins/dso/scripts/issue-quality-check.sh) as a FOURTH consumer that must be refactored in this story. issue-quality-check.sh counts items in ## File Impact / ### Files to modify sections via awk regex (~lines 83-91) as part of the QUALITY gate used by ticket creation flows. Post-refactor, new tickets created post-migration will have zero markdown items and QUALITY will silently fail-over to the line-count/keyword legacy path — degrading the quality signal and potentially affecting downstream gating. Amend issue-quality-check.sh to also count get-file-impact array entries and treat non-zero as satisfying file_impact_items. [adversarial-review, blue-team accepted]
